spells.material: Diamond dust worth 100 gp, which the spell consumes.

spells.material: A lodestone and a pinch of dust.

spells.name: Flesh to Stone

spells.name: Globe of Invulnerability
spells.material: A glass or crystal bead that shatters when the spell ends.

spells.name: Guards and Wards

spells.name: Heroes' Feast
spells.material: A gem-encrusted bowl worth at least 1,000gp, which the spell consumes.

spells.name: Instant Summons
spells.material: A sapphire worth 1,000 gp.

spells.name: Magic Jar
spells.material: A gem, crystal, reliquary, or some other ornamental container worth at least 500 gp.

spells.name: Mass Suggestion

spells.name: Move Earth

spells.name: Sunbeam

spells.name: Wall of Thorns
spells.material: A handful of thorns.

spells.name: Wind Walk
spells.material: Fire and holy water.

spells.name: Arcane Sword
spells.material: A miniature platinum sword with a grip and pommel of copper and zinc, worth 250 gp.

spells.name: Delayed Blast Fireball
spells.material: A tiny ball of bat guano and sulfur.

spells.name: Forcecage
spells.material: Ruby dust worth 1,500 gp.

spells.name: Magnificent Mansion

spells.name: Plane Shift
spells.material: A forked, metal rod worth at least 250 gp, attuned to a particular plane of existence.

spells.name: Project Image

spells.name: Regenerate
spells.material: A prayer wheel and holy water.

spells.name: Resurrection

spells.name: Reverse Gravity
spells.material: A lodestone and iron filings.

spells.name: Sequester
spells.material: A powder composed of diamond, emerald, ruby, and sapphire dust worth at least 5,000 gp, which the spell consumes.

spells.name: Simulacrum
spells.material: Snow or ice in quantities sufficient to made a life-size copy of the duplicated creature; some hair, fingernail clippings, or other piece of that creature's body placed inside the snow or ice; and powdered ruby worth 1,500 gp, sprinkled over the duplicate and consumed by the spell.

spells.name: Symbol
spells.material: Mercury, phosphorus, and powdered diamond and opal with a total value of at least 1,000 gp, which the spell consumes.

spells.name: Antimagic Field
spells.material: A pinch of powdered iron or iron filings.

spells.name: Antipathy/Sympathy
spells.material: Either a lump of alum soaked in vinegar for the antipathy effect or a drop of honey for the sympathy effect.

spells.name: Clone
spells.material: A diamond worth at least 1,000 gp and at least 1 cubic inch of flesh of the creature that is to be cloned, which the spell consumes, and a vessel worth at least 2,000 gp that has a sealable lid and is large enough to hold a Medium creature, such as a huge urn, coffin, mud-filled cyst in the ground, or crystal container filled with salt water.

spells.name: Control Weather
spells.material: Burning incense and bits of earth and wood mixed in water.

spells.name: Earthquake
spells.material: A pinch of dirt, a piece of rock, and a lump of clay.

spells.name: Feeblemind
spells.material: A handful of clay, crystal, glass, or mineral spheres.

spells.name: Holy Aura
spells.material: A tiny reliquary worth at least 1,000gp containing a sacred relic, such as a scrap of cloth from a saint's robe or a piece of parchment from a religious text.

spells.name: Sunburst
spells.material: Fire and a piece of sunstone.

spells.name: Astral Projection
spells.material: For each creature you affect with this spell, you must provide one jacinth worth at least 1,000gp and one ornately carved bar of silver worth at least 100gp, all of which the spell consumes.

spells.name: Foresight
spells.material: A hummingbird feather.

spells.name: Gate
spells.material: A diamond worth at least 5,000gp.

spells.name: Imprisonment
spells.material: A vellum depiction or a carved statuette in the likeness of the target, and a special component that varies according to the version of the spell you choose, worth at least 500gp per Hit Die of the target.

spells.name: Shapechange
spells.material: A jade circlet worth at least 1,500 gp, which you must place on your head before you cast the spell.

spells.name: True Polymorph
spells.material: A drop of mercury, a dollop of gum arabic, and a wisp of smoke.

spells.name: True Resurrection
spells.material: A sprinkle of holy water and diamonds worth at least 25,000gp, which the spell consumes.
